text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 142 

GAP_TIER_DRUG_TYPE 

LABEL: Gap Drug Type by Tier 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies what types of drugs, if any, are covered on each formulary tier during the 
coverage gap phase. A tier may include multiple drug types. 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 6 (starting in 2018, length is 2) 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: For 2007 — 2017 data — this is a binary character
